_description: v7.8 Mechanism F + I scaffolding. Tracks which agent (feature branch + worktree) holds a write lease on which paths. v7.8 ships this populated but UNENFORCED — pre-commit does not require lease acquisition; /pm-workflow does not call membrane-acquire.py. v7.9 promotes both to enforced. The `epoch` counter increments on every acquire; v7.9 fencing uses it (Kleppmann Redlock pattern). v7.8 just tracks it as scaffolding.
_concurrency: fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX) on every write per scripts/flock_writer.py. SSD-only — refuses to operate on NFS-mounted state per spec §11 risk register.
